title: City Awakens
prompt: Describe the scene when the city slowly wakes up under the sunlight.
hint: Focus on the imagery of sunlight, city, and nature waking up.
sample: The sunlight passes over the wires, and the city slowly opens its eyes, welcoming the starlight.
ja: {'prompt': '描述城市在陽光下慢慢醒來的場景。', 'hint': '聚焦於陽光、城市和大自然甦醒的意象。', 'sample': '陽光翻過籠線之後，城市慢慢睜開雙膜，迎接占星的一個塵光。'}
local: {'prompt': '描述城市在陽光下慢慢醒來的場景。', 'hint': '聚焦於陽光、城市和大自然甦醒的意象。', 'sample': '陽光翻過籠線之後，城市慢慢睜開雙膜，迎接占星的一個塵光。'}
local_pron: {'prompt': 'Miaoshu chengshi zai yangguang xia manman xinglai de changjing.', 'hint': 'Jujiao yu yangguang, chengshi he daziran suxing de yixiang.', 'sample': 'Yangguang fan guo long xian zhihou, chengshi manman zhengkai shuang mo, yingjie zhanxing de yi ge chen guang.'}

title: Everyday People Shine
prompt: Explain how ordinary people shine in the city.
hint: Talk about how daily life and people’s efforts turn into wings and light.
sample: Every ordinary person shines in this city, slowly turning the weight of life into wings.
ja: {'prompt': '說明普通人在城市中如何發光。', 'hint': '談論日常生活和人們的努力如何變成翅膀和光芒。', 'sample': '每個平凡的人都在這座城裡發光，把生活的重量慢慢變成翅膀。'}
local: {'prompt': '說明普通人在城市中如何發光。', 'hint': '談論日常生活和人們的努力如何變成翅膀和光芒。', 'sample': '每個平凡的人都在這座城裡發光，把生活的重量慢慢變成翅膀。'}
local_pron: {'prompt': 'Shuoming putong ren zai chengshi zhong ruhe faguang.', 'hint': 'Tanlun richang shenghuo he renmen de nuli ruhe bian cheng chi bang he guangmang.', 'sample': 'Mei ge pingfan de ren dou zai zhe zuo cheng li faguang, ba shenghuo de zhongliang manman bian cheng chi bang.'}

title: Youth and Dreams
prompt: Describe the feelings about youth and dreams in the city.
hint: Mention the connection between youth, dreams, and the city’s scenery.
sample: I know youth lives in the heart when the sunset colors the beautiful wind of Gaomei.
ja: {'prompt': '描述對城市中青春與夢想的感受。', 'hint': '提到青春、夢想與城市風景的連結。', 'sample': '當夕陽染紅高美的風，我知道青春人在心中。'}
local: {'prompt': '描述對城市中青春與夢想的感受。', 'hint': '提到青春、夢想與城市風景的連結。', 'sample': '當夕陽染紅高美的風，我知道青春人在心中。'}

title: Memories and Home
prompt: Talk about how memories and home remain in the heart despite the passage of time.
hint: Focus on the idea that time takes answers but not the home in the heart.
sample: Years take away many answers but cannot take away the home in the heart.
ja: {'prompt': '談論記憶和家如何在時間流逝中留在心中。', 'hint': '聚焦於時間帶走答案卻帶不走心中的家的概念。', 'sample': '歲月帶走許多回答，卻帶不走心中的家。'}
local: {'prompt': '談論記憶和家如何在時間流逝中留在心中。', 'hint': '聚焦於時間帶走答案卻帶不走心中的家的概念。', 'sample': '歲月帶走許多回答，卻帶不走心中的家。'}

title: Light in the Sky
prompt: Describe how light falls on the sky and illuminates people’s faces.
hint: Mention the light in the sky and how it brightens the faces of dreamers.
sample: Light falls on the colorful sky, illuminating every face lost in dreams.
ja: {'prompt': '描述光如何落在天空並照亮人們的面孔。', 'hint': '提到天空中的光如何照亮醉夢中的面孔。', 'sample': '光落在彩中的天空，照亮每個醉夢的面孔。'}
